name: penny
description: Penny — an AI back office for small businesses (M32 take-home)

scripts.dev: npm run free-ports && concurrently -n api,ai,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w api" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.dev:win: concurrently -n api,ai,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w api" "npm run dev:ai:win" "npm run dev -w web"
